purpose: The COS.Lending.Selling.WebApi repository is a .NET backend service for managing loan selling and purchasing operations between Marketplace Lenders (MPLs) and investors in a financial ecosystem.
businessFeatures: Loan purchasing and funding process management
Loan grooming (changing investor or loan type)
Monthly minimum fee calculation and processing
Reporting generation for pre-sale and post-sale activities
apis: Fee collection endpoints (DMV, Florida Stamp Tax, Loan Payoff Shortfall, Merchant Fees)
Loan grooming endpoints for changing investor or loan type
Reporting generation endpoints for pre-sale and post-sale reports
dataEntities: Loan - Central entity representing a loan with properties like status, amount, type
LoanAction - Represents actions performed on loans (purchases, interest calculations, fee collections)
Transfer - Represents money movements between accounts with status tracking
Account - Represents financial accounts involved in transfers
LoanAccount - Maps loans to specific account types
Contract - Defines relationships and fee structures between MPLs and the bank
Batch - Groups loans for bulk processing
PendingApproval - Represents loans awaiting approval for grooming
GroomingProcess - Tracks the workflow of changing loan properties
InterestHistory - Tracks interest accruals on loans
VolumeFeeMonthlyMinimum - Tracks monthly minimum fee requirements
dependencies: Entity Framework Core for database access
Microsoft Extensions for configuration and DI
integrations: COS (Core Operating System) for transfer operations
Storage service for report generation and storage
architecturePatterns: Outbox pattern for reliable message processing
Functional core, imperative shell architecture (F# core business logic)
Multi-language architecture (F# for business logic, C# for infrastructure)
CQRS-like separation between read and write operations
Domain-Driven Design influences in entity modeling
keyFiles: CRB.COS.Lending.Selling.OutboxProcessors/OutboxProcessorBase.cs - Base class for all outbox processors implementing the outbox pattern
CRB.COS.Lending.Selling.OutboxProcessors/Handlers/DailyInterestOutboxHandler.cs - Handles daily interest calculations and transfers
CRB.COS.Lending.Selling.OutboxProcessors/Processors/TransferOutboxProcessor.cs - Processes transfer requests from the outbox
CRB.COS.Lending.Selling.OutboxProcessors/Processors/VolumeFeeOutboxProcessor.cs - Processes volume fee transfers from the outbox
CRB.COS.Lending.Selling.OutboxProcessors/Services/TransferStatusSyncService.cs - Synchronizes transfer statuses with external systems
CRB.Cos.Lending.Selling.BusinessLogic/PurchaseLoans.fs - Core business logic for loan purchasing
findings: The system uses an outbox pattern for reliable message processing across multiple services
F# is used for core business logic while C# is used for infrastructure code
The system handles multiple types of fees (DMV, Florida Stamp Tax, Loan Payoff Shortfall, Merchant Fees)
Loan grooming processes support changing loan types and investors
Specific handling exists for retroactive interest calculations during loan processing
The system has special handling for certain MPLs (e.g., Zendable) in reporting
